name: cry-Dropshot
accumulator: x; incremented by config.extra.Xmult_mod (0.2) × count of non-scoring suited cards in full_hand matching the round's dropshot suit, in context.before each hand
notes: context.before counts non-scoring-hand cards of the random suit and adds Xmult_mod*count to x_mult; joker_main reads x_mult if >1. The suit is a per-round game state value (G.GAME.current_round.cry_dropshot_card.suit) unavailable at engine call time — accumulator wiring requires external state. joker_main kotlin is the read branch.

name: cry-Happy House
notes: Counts hands played (context.before increments immutable.check); once check exceeds 114 triggers an unlock. joker_main fires Emult_mod (Cryptid-only exponential-mult) when check > trigger — Emult is not a field in the Kotlin engine (not xMultMod/multMod/chipMod), so this effect cannot be represented in the current scoring engine.

name: cry-Pot of Jokes
notes: Fires on context.end_of_round; incrementally grows hand size (G.hand:change_size) via SMODS.scale_card on h_size/h_mod. No scoring effect (chips/mult/xmult).

name: cry-Queen's Gambit
notes: Fires on context.destroying_card when a Queen is destroyed during a Royal Flush hand; creates a new negative-edition joker and removes the Queen. No chips/mult/xmult returned at any point.

name: cry-Wee Fibonacci
kotlin: if (oc.id == 14 || oc.id == 2 || oc.id == 3 || oc.id == 5 || oc.id == 8) j.mult += 3.0
accumulator: mult; +3 per scored card whose rank is A/2/3/5/8 (Fibonacci), accumulated in individual context; joker_main reads: if (j.mult > 0) return Fx().apply { multMod = j.mult }
notes: Two-branch pattern matching krustytheclown. individual branch accumulates j.mult by mult_mod (3.0 default); joker_main emits multMod = j.mult if >0. Modest gameset uses mult_mod=1.

name: cry-The WHIP
accumulator: x; incremented by config.extra.Xmult_mod (0.5) once per hand played if full_hand contains both a 2 and a 7 of different suits, in context.before; joker_main reads x_mult if >1
notes: context.before checks full_hand for a 2 and a 7 that are either of different suits or either card is multi-suited; if so, scales x_mult += Xmult_mod (0.5). joker_main reads accumulated x_mult. Accumulator increments once per qualifying hand, not per card.

name: cry-Lucky Joker
notes: Economy joker: fires in context.individual when context.other_card.lucky_trigger is true (Lucky card procs); grants $5 (config.extra.dollars) via G.GAME.dollar_buffer. No chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cry-Cursor
accumulator: chips; +8 (config.extra.chip_mod) per card bought from shop (context.buying_card), accumulated outside scoring; joker_main reads chips if >0
notes: Scaling +Chips joker. SMODS.scale_card on chips/chip_mod fires in context.buying_card (shop phase). joker_main emits chipMod = chips if chips > 0. Accumulator is shop-phase only, not scoring-phase — j.chips must be pre-populated from prior shop purchases.

name: cry-Pickle
notes: Fires on context.skip_blind (adds up to min(tags,20) random tags) and context.setting_blind (decrements tags count by tags_mod each blind; self-destructs when tags reach 0). No scoring effect.

name: cry-Booster
notes: No calculate function. Modifies booster pack slot limit via add_to_deck/remove_from_deck (calls SMODS.change_booster_limit). Purely a deck-construction utility; no chips/mult/xmult contribution during hand scoring.

name: cry-Chili Pepper
accumulator: x; += Xmult_mod (0.5) each end_of_round via SMODS.scale_card (default operation '+', additive). Starts at 1 (no-op guard); grows 1 -> 1.5 -> 2.0 ... over up to 8 rounds, then self-destructs.
notes: Scaling Xmult that accumulates via end_of_round (not scoring). joker_main read branch (xMultMod = j.x when j.x > 1) is correct. DIRECTION CORRECTED 2026-06-16: SMODS.scale_card defaults to operation '+' (Steamodded utils.lua), so Xmult GROWS +0.5/round, not halves — the earlier 'multiplies/weakens' reading was wrong. The run-loop sets j.x; the engine only reads it. Verified by oracle case 'chili_pepper @x=2.0 (2 end_of_round) -> 128' (1 + 2*0.5 = 2.0), which is green.

name: cry-Compound Interest
notes: Economy joker. Only has calc_dollar_bonus hook: awards floor(percent/100 * current dollars) in cash each end-of-round, and scales percent up by percent_mod (3) per activation. No calculate function, no chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cry-Big Cube
notes: Fires context.joker_main returning Xchip_mod=6 (a Cryptid-specific chip X-multiplier: multiplies the chip total rather than adding). The engine Fx class has no xChipMod field — only chipMod (+chips), multMod (+mult), xMultMod (Xmult). Cannot be faithfully represented as chipMod (that would be +6 chips flat, not X6 chips). Needs a new Fx field or special dispatch; left empty pending engine extension.

name: cry-eternalflame
accumulator: x; multiplied by extra (0.1) each time a card is sold via context.selling_card (SMODS.scale_card with scalar_value=extra). Starts at x_mult=1 (no-op); grows each time any card worth >=2 gold is sold.
notes: Scaling Xmult read at joker_main; accumulator incremented in context.selling_card (sell-card event, not a scoring context). Pattern matches j_cry_krustytheclown: individual branch does the accumulate, joker_main branch reads it.

name: cry-Nice
kotlin: val has6 = ctx.fullHand.any { it.id == 6 }; val has9 = ctx.fullHand.any { it.id == 9 }; if (has6 && has9) return Fx().apply { chipMod = 420.0 }
notes: Flat +420 chips at joker_main if the full played hand contains at least one 6 and at least one 9 (a '69' combo). Uses ctx.fullHand (context.full_hand in Lua).

name: cry-Seal The Deal
notes: Fires on context.after (post-scoring cleanup). If hands_left==0 (or panopticon active), applies a random seal to every unsealed card in the scoring hand. No chips/mult/xmult contribution.

name: cry-Chad
notes: DELIBERATELY UNWIRED 2026-06-16. Chad retriggers the LEFT-MOST joker (G.jokers.cards[1]) config.extra.retriggers=2 times (capped at immutable.max_retriggers=25) via context.retrigger_joker_check. The engine has NO joker-retrigger pass — the JOKER MAIN pass (Score.kt) evaluates each joker's main effect exactly once, and the only reps loop is per-scored-CARD (Score.kt ~L346), which retriggers cards, not jokers. The earlier proposal mapping this to repetitions in an other_joker branch was wrong (that would retrigger scored cards). retrigger_joker_check is a RECURRING Cryptid family — also j_cry_spectrogram, j_cry_flip_side, j_cry_blur, m_cry_loopy, and the m_cry_echo edition. Faithful support needs a dedicated joker-retrigger dispatch around the joker_main pass (mirroring the per-card reps loop) plus real LÖVE baselines; tracked as its own batch, not approximated here.

name: cry-Jimball
accumulator: x; multiplied by x_mult_mod (0.15) each context.before if this hand type has been played fewer times than every other visible hand type (resets to 1.0 if any other hand type has been played >= times). Starts at x_mult=1 (no-op guard).
notes: Scaling Xmult read at joker_main; accumulator scaled up in context.before each hand where this hand type is the least-played (or resets if another hand type ties/exceeds it). Pattern matches j_cry_krustytheclown.

name: cry-sus
notes: end_of_round context on G.jokers: destroys held cards (except chosen card / King of Hearts) and copies one card into the deck; pure deck-manipulation, no scoring contribution

name: cry-fspinner
accumulator: chips; +6.0 per context.before trigger when another hand type has been played at least as many times as the current hand type (SMODS.scale_card, scalar_value=chip_mod=6)
notes: Accumulates +Chips in context.before (not individual/joker_main directly); joker_main reads j.chips if non-zero and returns chipMod

name: cry-wario
notes: context.post_trigger economy joker: gives $3 each time any joker triggers a non-fixed/non-mod probability effect; fires on post_trigger, not during scoring

name: cry-blurred Joker
notes: context.setting_blind: grants +1 hand (ease_hands_played) when a blind is selected; max_hand_size_mod=1000 cap is irrelevant for the +1 case; not a scoring joker

name: cry-gardenfork
notes: context.before on G.jokers: if the played full hand contains both an Ace (id=14) and a 7 (id=7), grants $7 economy via ease_dollars; fires before scoring, not during it

name: cry-nosound
notes: repetition context on played cards: gives 3 retriggers (capped at immutable max_retriggers=40, so effective value is min(40,3)=3) for any scored card with rank 7

name: cry-antennastoheaven
accumulator: x; +0.1 per scored rank-4 or rank-7 card (individual, SMODS.scale_card on x_chips starting at 1.0); joker_main returns Xchip_mod when x_chips > 1
notes: Lua fires joker_main (Xchip_mod = accumulated x_chips) and individual (scales x_chips +0.1 for 4s and 7s); Xchip_mod is a Cryptid-only X-Chips multiplier not present in Fx class — cannot be represented in the current engine, so classified non-scoring until Fx gains an xChipMod field

name: cry-hunger
notes: context.using_consumeable: grants $3 (p_dollars) each time a consumable is used; fires outside scoring evaluate_play cascade

name: cry-redbloon
notes: end_of_round economy: counts down rounds_remaining (starts at 2); when it reaches 0 grants $20 and self-destructs; no scoring contribution

name: cry-apjoker
notes: X4 Mult only during boss blind (context.joker_main && G.GAME.blind.boss). The boss-blind check is run-state that Sctx does not currently expose; engine would need ctx.isBossBlind or similar. Value 4 from config.extra.x_mult.

name: cry-maze
notes: No calculate function. Hooks into G.FUNCS.discard_cards_from_highlighted and play_cards_from_highlighted via overrides.lua to temporarily set hands_played/discards_used to 0 so that 'first hand' or 'no discards used' joker effects always fire. No chip/mult contribution.

name: cry-panopticon
notes: Fires on context.before/context.after only. Sets G.GAME.current_round.hands_left to 0 before hand evaluation so 'on last hand' effects always trigger, then restores the true value after. No chip/mult contribution.

name: cry-magnet
notes: Economy joker. calc_dollar_bonus: earns $money*Xmoney (default $10) at end-of-round if joker count <= slots (4), else $money (2). context.forcetrigger only triggers the dollar grant. No chip/mult scoring branch.

name: cry-Unjust Dagger
accumulator: x; incremented at setting_blind by +0.2 * sell_cost of the joker to the left (which is destroyed)
notes: Scaling Xmult dagger. On setting_blind, destroys the joker immediately to its left and adds +0.2 * that joker's sell_cost to x_mult (mapped to j.x). joker_main reads j.x and returns xMultMod if > 1. Starts at x_mult=1 so is a no-op until first kill.

name: cry-Monkey Dagger
accumulator: chips; incremented at setting_blind by +10 * sell_cost of the joker to the left (which is destroyed)
notes: Scaling +Chips dagger. On setting_blind, destroys the joker immediately to its left and adds +10 * that joker's sell_cost to chips (mapped to j.chips). joker_main reads j.chips if != 0. Starts at 0 so is a no-op until first kill.

name: cry-Pirate Dagger
accumulator: x; incremented at setting_blind by +0.25 * sell_cost of the joker to the right (which is destroyed)
notes: Scaling X-Chips dagger. joker_main returns Xchip_mod (a X-Chips multiplier, not Xmult) if x_chips > 1 — but the engine Fx class has no xChipMod field (only chipMod/xMultMod/multMod). Effect cannot be mapped to a scoring branch as defined. Non-scoring until engine adds Xchip support.

name: cry-mondrian
accumulator: x; incremented by +0.25 (config.extra.extra) at end_of_round if discards_used == 0
notes: Scaling Xmult joker. Gains +0.25 to x_mult (mapped to j.x) at end_of_round whenever 0 discards were used that round. joker_main reads j.x and returns xMultMod if > 1. Starts at x_mult=1, so is a no-op until first no-discard round.

name: cry-sapling
notes: Progression/economy joker. context.individual (play area) counts enhanced (non-Base) cards scored into an immutable counter. When counter >= 18 and the joker is sold, it creates a Rare (or Epic if enabled) joker. No chip/mult contribution during scoring.

name: cry-spaceglobe
kotlin: if (ctx.jokerMain) { if (j.x > 1.0) return Fx().apply { xMultMod = j.x } }
accumulator: x; multiplied by Xchipmod (×1.2) each time scoring_name matches target hand type (context.before), starting at 1.0; used here as Xchip not Xmult — no native xchips accumulator field in FJoker
notes: Scaling Xchip joker: accumulator lives in config.extra.x_chips (starts 1, multiplied by 1.2 each trigger in context.before when hand matches rotating target type). joker_main reads it as Xchip_mod; engine has no separate Xchip accumulator field so j.x is reused, but semantically this is xchips not xmult — caller must wire the before-phase accumulation separately outside calcJoker.

name: cry-happy
notes: Creates a random Joker card on sell_self (if joker slots available) and on end_of_round (same condition); purely economy/generation, no chips/mult/xmult emitted during evaluate_play.

name: cry-meteor
kotlin: val oj = ctx.otherJoker; if (oj != null) when (j.key) { "j_cry_meteor" -> if (oj.edition == "foil") return Fx().apply { multMod = 0.0; chipMod = 75.0 } }
notes: Fires +75 chips (chip_mod) in context.other_joker when the other joker has foil edition; also fires +75 chips per scored foil-edition playing card in context.individual (play), but PlayingCard has no edition field in the engine API so the individual branch cannot be expressed. other_joker branch is primary scoring path; individual branch noted as unsupported.

name: cry-exoplanet
notes: Fires +15 mult (mult_mod) in context.other_joker when the other joker has holo edition; also fires +15 mult per scored holo-edition playing card in context.individual (play), but PlayingCard has no edition field in the engine API so the individual branch is unsupported. Config: extra.mult = 15.

name: cry-stardust
notes: Fires X2 mult (Xmult_mod) in context.other_joker when the other joker has polychrome edition; also fires X2 per scored polychrome playing card in context.individual (play), but PlayingCard has no edition field in the engine API so the individual branch is unsupported. Config: extra.xmult = 2.

name: cry-rnjoker Joker
notes: Meta-joker with fully randomized abilities generated by Cryptid.rnjoker_randomize; can produce joker_main/individual/other_joker/repetition scoring effects of arbitrary type and value (plus_mult, plus_chips, x_mult, x_chips) with optional conditions (suit, rank, face, poker_hand, odds, hand size, etc.); resets every boss blind. Cannot be expressed as a fixed scoring branch — requires dynamic ability dispatch not supported by the static calcJoker pattern.

name: cry-filler
kotlin: if (ctx.scoringName == j.key.let { "High Card" } /* target hand from config.extra.type */ && j.x > 1.0) return Fx().apply { xMultMod = j.x }
accumulator: x; initialized from config.extra.Xmult = 1.00000000000003 (effectively X1); no run-time scaling — static value
notes: Fires Xmult_mod = config.extra.Xmult (1.00000000000003, effectively X1 — a no-op multiplier) in joker_main when scoringName matches target hand type (default: High Card). The near-1.0 value means it does nothing in practice; the type field is fixed at creation. Uses j.x to hold the Xmult read, but target hand type is not available from FJoker fields — would need to be stored separately. Low practical scoring impact.

name: cry-duos
kotlin: val hand = ctx.scoringName; if ((hand == "Two Pair" || hand == "Full House") && j.x > 1.0) return Fx().apply { xMultMod = j.x }
accumulator: x; initialized from config.extra.Xmult = 2.5; no run-time scaling — static value
notes: Fires X2.5 (Xmult_mod) in joker_main when played hand is Two Pair OR Full House. Config: extra.Xmult = 2.5, extra.type = Two Pair. The Full House condition is hardcoded alongside the type check. Uses j.x to hold the static Xmult (2.5).

name: cry-home
kotlin: if (ctx.scoringName == "Full House" && j.x > 1.0) return Fx().apply { xMultMod = j.x }
accumulator: x; initialized from config.extra.Xmult = 3.5; no run-time scaling — static value
notes: Fires X3.5 (Xmult_mod) in joker_main when played hand is Full House. Config: extra.Xmult = 3.5, extra.type = Full House. Uses j.x to hold the static Xmult (3.5).

name: cry-nuts
kotlin: if (j.x > 1.0 && ctx.scoringName == "Straight Flush") return Fx().apply { xMultMod = 5.0 }
notes: X5 Xmult when the scored hand is Straight Flush; checks context.poker_hands["Straight Flush"] which corresponds to ctx.scoringName; flat value from config.extra.Xmult=5, guard mirrors to_big(Xmult)>to_big(1)

name: cry-quintet
kotlin: if (j.x > 1.0 && ctx.scoringName == "Five of a Kind") return Fx().apply { xMultMod = 5.0 }
notes: X5 Xmult when the scored hand is Five of a Kind; same pattern as nuts but for the Cryptid-extended hand type; config.extra.Xmult=5

name: cry-unity
kotlin: if (j.x > 1.0 && ctx.scoringName == "Flush House") return Fx().apply { xMultMod = 9.0 }
notes: X9 Xmult when the scored hand is Flush House; config.extra.Xmult=9; same poker_hands table check pattern as nuts/quintet

name: cry-swarm
kotlin: if (j.x > 1.0 && ctx.scoringName == "Flush Five") return Fx().apply { xMultMod = 9.0 }
notes: X9 Xmult when the scored hand is Flush Five; config.extra.Xmult=9; same pattern as unity but for Flush Five

name: cry-stronghold
notes: X5 Xmult when the scored hand is the Cryptid-custom cry_Bulwark hand type; config.extra.Xmult=5; requires cry_poker_hand_stuff and c_cry_asteroidbelt dependencies

name: cry-wtf
notes: X10 Xmult when the scored hand is the Cryptid-custom cry_Clusterfuck hand type; config.extra.Xmult=10; notably has NO forcetrigger branch unlike most sibling jokers

name: cry-clash
notes: X12 Xmult when the scored hand is the Cryptid-custom cry_UltPair hand type; config.extra.Xmult=12; requires c_cry_marsmoons dependency

name: cry-the
notes: X2 Xmult when the scored hand is cry_None; uniquely uses context.scoring_name direct string comparison instead of the poker_hands table lookup used by all sibling jokers; config.extra.Xmult=2, requires c_cry_nibiru

name: cry-annihalation
notes: Fires Emult=5.2 (Cryptid dark-edition multiplier, not standard Xmult) when scored hand is cry_WholeDeck; config.extra.emult=5.2; Emult is a Cryptid-specific mechanic with no direct Fx field — approximated as xMultMod=5.2 but this is not semantically identical; requires c_cry_universe

name: cry-Giggly Joker
notes: +4 Mult when scored hand is High Card; flat joker_main effect, no accumulation

name: cry-Nutty Joker
notes: +19 Mult when scored hand is Four of a Kind; flat joker_main effect, no accumulation

name: cry-Manic Joker
notes: +22 Mult when scored hand is Straight Flush; flat joker_main effect, no accumulation

name: cry-Silly Joker
notes: +16 Mult when scored hand is Full House; flat joker_main effect, no accumulation

name: cry-Delirious Joker
notes: +22 Mult when scored hand is Five of a Kind; flat joker_main effect, no accumulation

name: cry-Wacky Joker
notes: +30 Mult when scored hand is Flush House; flat joker_main effect, no accumulation

name: cry-Kooky Joker
notes: +30 Mult when scored hand is Flush Five; flat joker_main effect, no accumulation

name: cry-Bonkers Joker
notes: +20 Mult when scored hand is cry_Bulwark; HandType.CRY_BULWARK not yet in engine HandType enum — must be added before this branch is reachable

name: cry-Fucked-Up Joker
notes: +37 Mult when scored hand is cry_Clusterfuck; HandType.CRY_CLUSTERFUCK not yet in engine HandType enum — must be added before this branch is reachable

name: cry-Foolhardy Joker
notes: +42 Mult when the played hand contains cry_UltPair; flat joker_main scoring, no accumulator

name: cry-undefined Joker
notes: +5 Mult when scoring hand is cry_None (the Cryptid 'no hand' type); uses context.scoring_name equality check in Lua

name: cry-Words Cant Even
notes: X52000000 Xmult when played hand contains cry_WholeDeck; uses xmult (not mult_mod) in Lua return

name: cry-Dubious Joker
notes: +20 Chips when played hand contains High Card; flat chip joker_main scoring

name: cry-Shrewd Joker
kotlin: if (ctx.scoringName == "Four of a Kind") return Fx().apply { chipMod = 150.0 }
notes: +150 Chips when played hand contains Four of a Kind; flat chip joker_main scoring

name: cry-Tricksy Joker
notes: +170 Chips when played hand contains Straight Flush; flat chip joker_main scoring

name: cry-Foxy Joker
notes: +130 Chips when played hand contains Full House; flat chip joker_main scoring

name: cry-Savvy Joker
kotlin: if (ctx.scoringName == "Five of a Kind") return Fx().apply { chipMod = 170.0 }
notes: +170 Chips when played hand contains Five of a Kind; flat chip joker_main scoring, only appears in pool after Five of a Kind played

name: cry-Subtle Joker
notes: +240 Chips when played hand contains Flush House; flat chip joker_main scoring, only appears in pool after Flush House played

name: cry-Discreet Joker
kotlin: if (ctx.scoringHand.isNotEmpty() /* Flush Five check via poker_hands */) return Fx().apply { chipMod = 240.0 }
notes: joker_main: +240 chips when the played hand is Flush Five (config.extra.t_chips=240, type=Flush Five); guard is context.poker_hands["Flush Five"] non-empty

name: cry-Adroit Joker
notes: joker_main: +170 chips when the played hand is cry_Bulwark (config.extra.t_chips=170); guard checks context.poker_hands["cry_Bulwark"] non-empty

name: cry-Penetrating Joker
notes: joker_main: +270 chips when the played hand is cry_Clusterfuck (config.extra.t_chips=270); guard checks context.poker_hands["cry_Clusterfuck"] non-empty

name: cry-Treacherous Joker
notes: joker_main: +300 chips when the played hand is cry_UltPair (config.extra.t_chips=300); guard checks context.poker_hands["cry_UltPair"] non-empty

name: cry-Nebulous Joker
notes: joker_main: +30 chips when the played hand is cry_None (config.extra.t_chips=30, type=cry_None); notably uses context.scoring_name not context.poker_hands unlike sibling jokers

name: cry-Many Lost Minds
notes: joker_main: +8.0658175e67 chips (52 factorial) when played hand is cry_WholeDeck (config.extra.chips=8.0658175e67); the return key is 'chips' not 'chip_mod' in Lua but effect is additive chips

name: cry-Coin
notes: fires on context.selling_card when a Joker is sold; gives a random money amount (1 * random_multiplier up to money_mod=10, or 4 in modest mode); pure economy joker, no chips/mult/xmult effect

name: cry-Wheelhope
accumulator: x; +0.5 per Wheel of Fortune pseudorandom_result trigger (context.pseudorandom_result with identifier=="wheel_of_fortune")
notes: joker_main reads accumulated x_mult (j.x) when >1; x_mult starts at 1 and grows by +extra (0.5) each time the Wheel of Fortune effect fires via context.pseudorandom_result; the accumulation trigger is non-scoring (probability hook), only the joker_main read is scoring

name: cry-Night
kotlin: if (ctx.handsLeft == 0 && j.mult > 1) return Fx().apply { multMod = j.mult }
notes: joker_main: fires Emult_mod (exponent/power mult, not standard xmult) only when hands_left==0 on the final hand; config.extra.mult=3 (modest: 2); Emult_mod is a Cryptid-specific exponent effect not present in standard Fx — mapped to multMod as best approximation but this loses the power-mult semantic; joker also destroys itself after the last hand via context.after

name: cry-busdriver
notes: joker_main probabilistic ±50 mult (odds=4); gain mult if pseudorandom < 1-1/(cry_prob*odds), lose mult otherwise; cry_prob is a run-state probability modifier not available in ctx, so sign cannot be computed faithfully — low confidence

name: cry-translucent Joker
notes: fires on context.selling_self; duplicates a random non-negative joker as a perishable banana copy; pure joker-generation effect, no scoring contribution

name: cry-morse
notes: fires on context.selling_card when the sold card has an edition; scales internal money counter via SMODS.scale_card; pays out via calc_dollar_bonus at end-of-round; pure economy joker, no scoring contribution

name: cry-membershipcard
notes: joker_main Xmult = 0.1 * Cryptid.member_count (the live Discord member count fetched via HTTPS); Xmult_mod=0.1 per member; total is dynamic external state unavailable at scoring time — cannot faithfully replicate without that value

name: cry-kscope
notes: fires on context.end_of_round during boss blind; grants polychrome edition to a random non-edition joker; pure board-mutation effect, no scoring contribution

name: cry_cryptidmoment
notes: fires on context.selling_self; increases extra_value (and thus sell cost) of all jokers in play by max(1, floor(money)); pure economy/card-value effect, no scoring contribution

name: cry-Flip Side
kotlin:
val oj = ctx.otherJoker
if (oj != null && oj.edition == "cry_double_sided") return Fx().apply { repetitions = 1 }
notes: fires on context.retrigger_joker_check (not a standard dispatch guard); gives +1 repetition to any joker with the double_sided edition; closest mapping is other_joker dispatch but the retrigger_joker_check context is not a direct equivalent — medium confidence due to context mismatch

name: cry-Old Invisible Joker
notes: fires on context.selling_card when a joker is sold; increments internal counter (extra); at 3 sells resets counter and duplicates a random other joker; pure joker-generation/economy effect, no scoring contribution

name: cry-FractalFingers
notes: no calculate function at all; add_to_deck/remove_from_deck increase play and discard limits by extra=2; pure deck-limit modifier, no scoring contribution

name: cry-universe
kotlin: if (oj.edition == "cry_astral" && oj !== j) return Fx().apply { xMultMod = j.x }
notes: Fires in context.other_joker when the board joker has cry_astral edition (Emult_mod = 1.2 per astral joker); also fires in context.individual for played/held cards with cry_astral edition (e_mult). Both effects use Cryptid-exclusive 'e_mult'/'Emult_mod' (edition-exponent-mult) not present in the Fx schema — mapped to xMultMod as best-effort; cry_astral edition tracking is not in the engine, so this cannot be faithfully ported without adding edition='cry_astral' support to FJoker/PlayingCard and a new Fx field.

name: cry-astral_bottle
notes: Fires on context.selling_self: grants cry_astral edition (and optionally perishable) to random board jokers. Pure economy/edition-granting effect; no scoring context.

name: cry-kittyprinter
notes: Flat X2 Xmult every hand. config.extra.Xmult = 2.

name: cry-kidnap
notes: Economy joker: fires in calc_dollar_bonus (end of round) and context.forcetrigger, paying $4 * count-of-sold-type-mult-jokers. No scoring context.

name: cry-Exposed
notes: Retriggers non-face scored cards +2 times (config.extra.retriggers=2, capped at immutable.max_retriggers=40). The Lua also debuffs all face cards via update(), which is a board-state side effect outside scoring.

name: cry-Mask
notes: Retriggers face scored cards +3 times (config.extra.retriggers=3, capped at immutable.max_retriggers=40). The Lua also debuffs all non-face cards via update(), which is a board-state side effect outside scoring.

name: cry-Tropical Smoothie
notes: Fires on context.selling_self: calls Cryptid.manipulate on all other jokers (upgrades their scaling value by config.extra=1.5). Pure sell-trigger utility; no scoring context.

name: cry-pumpkin
notes: Fires on context.game_over (saves the blind if chips >= 50% of required) and context.cry_start_dissolving (spawns j_cry_carved_pumpkin). Blind-save and card-transformation mechanics; no scoring context.

name: cry-carved_pumpkin
notes: Fires on context.setting_blind (disables boss blind) and context.end_of_round (decrements disables counter, dissolves at 0). Pure boss-blind disabler; no scoring context. Cannot appear in pool normally (in_pool returns false; only spawned by j_cry_pumpkin).

name: cry-Clicked Cookie
accumulator: chips; starts at 200, decremented by chip_mod (1) on each cry_press click event (non-scoring UI context)
notes: Flat +chips in joker_main equal to the current ability.extra.chips value (starts 200, decreases 1 per click via cry_press). cry_press is not a scoring context so only joker_main branch is scoring.

name: cry-Necromancer
notes: Fires on context.selling_card: when a joker is sold, resurrects a previously-sold joker from G.GAME.jokers_sold and adds it to the board. No chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cry-Oil-Lamp
notes: Fires on context.end_of_round: calls Cryptid.manipulate on the joker immediately to the right of it (×1.2 upgrade). No chips/mult/xmult scoring effect.

name: cry-Tax-Fraud
notes: Economy joker: calc_dollar_bonus gives $6 per rental joker present at end-of-round. Fires outside evaluate_play; no chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cry-Pity-Prize
notes: Fires on context.skipping_booster: adds a random tag when a booster pack is skipped. No chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cry-Digital Hallucinations
notes: Fires on context.open_booster with 1-in-2 probability: creates a free negative consumable, joker, or playing card depending on booster type. No chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cry-Arsonist
notes: Fires on context.destroying_card: prevents card destruction if the full hand contains a Full House. Deck-manipulation hook, no chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cry-Zooble
accumulator: mult; incremented in context.before by a_mult (1) × count of unique ranks among non-straight scored cards
notes: context.before (before=true, cardarea==jokers) accumulates j.mult += a_mult * unique_rank_count when hand is not a Straight or Straight Flush. joker_main reads and emits it as +Mult only if mult > 0.

name: cry-LeBaron James
notes: Fires on context.individual (play area) when scored card is a King (id==13): increases hand size by h_mod (1) up to max_h_mod (1000) total. Modifies hand size, not chips/mult/xmult. Resets added_h on end_of_round.

name: huntingseason
notes: Fires on context.destroy_card during play/unscored; destroys the middle card of a 3-card played hand (non-eternal). No chips/mult/xmult effect.

name: cat_owl
notes: Fires on context.check_enhancement; makes Lucky cards count as Echo and Echo cards count as Lucky. Enhancement aliasing, not direct scoring.

name: eyeofhagane
notes: Fires on context.before; temporarily sets Steel enhancement on all face cards in the scoring hand before scoring begins. Does not itself add chips/mult — the Steel enhancement does during individual card scoring.

name: familiar_currency
notes: Fires on context.end_of_round economy: spends $19 (config.extra=19) and creates a random Meme-set joker if the player can afford it and has joker slots free.

name: highfive
notes: Fires on context.final_scoring_step; if 5 is the highest rank in the scoring hand (but not all cards are 5s), it changes all non-5 cards to rank 5 via SMODS.change_base. Card mutation, not direct chips/mult addition.

name: sock_and_sock
kotlin: if (oc.enhancement == Enhancement.ABSTRACT) return Fx().apply { repetitions = minOf(40, j.n.takeIf { it > 0 } ?: 1) }
notes: Fires on context.repetition for played cards with m_cry_abstract enhancement; grants 1 retrigger (config.extra.retriggers=1, capped at immutable.max_retriggers=40). The engine's FJoker.n is not the right field here — the flat value is 1 from config.extra.retriggers. Medium confidence because engine representation of the capped retrigger count needs verification.

name: yarnball
notes: Fires on context.mod_probability; increases the numerator of probability rolls by the highest cat-tag level in the run. Probability hacking, not scoring.

name: pizza
notes: Fires on context.end_of_round (countdown) and context.selling_self; when sold after a 3-round countdown it spawns up to config.extra.slices=6 copies of j_cry_pizza_slice jokers. Economy/card-generation joker.

name: pizza_slice
accumulator: x; +0.5 per other pizza_slice sold (context.selling_card with key==j_cry_pizza_slice, via SMODS.scale_card incrementing card.ability.extra.xmult)
notes: Fires joker_main returning Xmult_mod = card.ability.extra.xmult (starts at 1, grows +0.5 per other pizza_slice sold). Starting xmult of 1 is a no-op multiplier, so guard j.x>1.0 follows convention. Confidence medium because the selling_card scaling path needs engine wiring outside calcJoker.

name: Paved Joker
notes: No calculate function at all; effect is entirely in a SMODS.four_fingers override and get_straight override that allow stone cards (up to ability.extra count) to fill gaps in straight detection — a hand-composition mechanic, not a scoring one

name: Fading Joker
accumulator: x; +xmult_mod (=1.0) per perishable_debuffed custom-context event (fires when any perishable joker is about to expire, outside the normal scoring loop); initial xmult = 1
notes: Scaling Xmult joker; xmult starts at 1 and grows by +1 each time a perishable joker hits perish_tally==1; joker_main reads accumulated j.x as Xmult_mod; accumulator wired outside scoring via Card:calculate_perishable hook

name: Poor Joker
accumulator: mult; +mult_mod (=4) per context.rental custom-context event (fires when a rental joker charges rent, outside the normal scoring loop); initial mult = 0
notes: Scaling +Mult joker; mult starts at 0 and grows by +4 each time a rental joker fires its rental cost; joker_main reads accumulated j.mult as mult_mod; accumulator wired outside scoring via Card:calculate_rental hook

name: Broken Sync Catalyst
notes: Fires joker_main and emits cry_broken_swap = 10 (clamped portion*100); handled by a SMODS.calculate_individual_effect override that swaps portion (0.1 = 10%) of current chips into mult and vice versa atomically; not a simple chips/mult/xmult add — requires custom swap logic on the running score accumulators

name: Thalia and Melpomeme
accumulator: n; xmgain = 1 (config.extra.xmgain, immutable); dynamic: n = unique rarity count of all jokers on board, bonus = n*(n-1)/2, xMult = bonus * xmgain (or 1 if bonus < 1)
notes: Legendary (rarity 4) joker; Xmult = (n choose 2) * xmgain where n = count of unique rarities on the joker board; requires enumerating ctx board joker rarities at score time — no standard Sctx field exposes the full board joker list, so this cannot be faithfully expressed in a simple calcJoker branch without engine changes

name: Key Change
accumulator: x; +xmgain (=0.25 additive via SMODS.scale_card default '+' operation) per context.before when the current hand type has been played fewer than 2 times this round; resets to 1.0 at end_of_round; initial xm = 1
notes: Scaling Xmult joker; xm starts at 1 and gains +0.25 each time a hand type is played for the first time this round (context.before guard: played_this_round < 2); joker_main reads j.x; resets to 1 at end_of_round — engine must wire the before-context increment and end-of-round reset separately

name: Emergency Chips
notes: Fires exclusively on context.selling_self (when the joker itself is sold during SELECTING_HAND state); adds G.GAME.blind.chips * 0.2 directly to G.GAME.chips to boost the running score — a sell-time economy/rescue mechanic, not part of evaluate_play scoring
